lines.text: Hello there, traveler! What brings you to these parts?
Ah, another wanderer. You look like you've seen better days.
I need someone brave enough to venture into the old keep. You up for it?
En garde! You'll regret crossing me!
Is that all you've got? I've fought tougher skeevers!
Safe travels, friend. May the roads treat you kindly.
Strange things have been happening around here lately...
